contract.stdout:
contract-live-mission-plan-smoke-8fd26483
mission_id=mission-live-mission-plan-smoke-4957ef45

Summary
A system to transform high-level text goals into structured, actionable JSON 
mission plans containing milestones, assertions, and features with strict 
dependency mapping.

Assertions
- assertion-schema-compliance-8b732f99: Schema Compliance  -> JSON schema 
validation against the target output.
- assertion-logical-integrity-8bb4817a: Logical Integrity  -> Graph traversal of
the generated JSON to ensure no orphaned features or assertions.
- assertion-goal-coverage-0af8ce3c: Goal Coverage  -> Check length of arrays in 
the generated JSON object.

show.stdout:
Live Mission Plan Smoke
id=mission-live-mission-plan-smoke-4957ef45
status=planned
created_by=human
current_milestone_id=milestone-core-plan-engine-798241e7

Goal
Generate a mission plan from a high-level goal and persist milestones, features,
and assertions.

draft.contract_summary: A system to transform high-level text goals into structured, actionable JSON mission plans containing milestones, assertions, and features with strict dependency mapping.

milestones.label: m1
milestones.title: Core Plan Engine
milestones.summary: Implementation of the logic to parse goals and generate the structured JSON mission plan schema.

milestones.label: m2
milestones.title: Persistence Layer
milestones.summary: Mechanism to save and retrieve generated mission plans from disk or database.

assertions.label: a1
assertions.title: Schema Compliance
assertions.description: The output must strictly adhere to the provided JSON schema, including all required keys.
assertions.verification_method: JSON schema validation against the target output.

assertions.label: a2
assertions.title: Logical Integrity
assertions.description: Every feature must be linked to at least one assertion, and every feature must belong to a milestone.
assertions.verification_method: Graph traversal of the generated JSON to ensure no orphaned features or assertions.

assertions.label: a3
assertions.title: Goal Coverage
assertions.description: The generated plan must include at least one milestone, one assertion, and one feature.
assertions.verification_method: Check length of arrays in the generated JSON object.

features.label: f1
features.title: Plan Generator Implementation
features.summary: Implement the primary logic that maps input strings to the JSON structure.

features.label: f2
features.title: Dependency Validator
features.summary: Implement a validator that ensures features point to valid milestones and assertions.

features.label: f3
features.title: File System Persistence
features.summary: Implement functionality to write the mission plan to a .json file.
